default.description: Balanced local development and demo profile

production.description: Stricter profile for CI/CD security gates

security-lab.description: Allows some lab-oriented images while keeping host escape checks strict

container_rules.title: Policy forbids privileged containers
container_rules.impact: Privileged mode grants broad host-level access.
container_rules.recommendation: Remove privileged mode and grant only required capabilities.

container_rules.title: Policy forbids Docker socket mounts
container_rules.impact: Docker socket access can allow control of the host Docker daemon.
container_rules.recommendation: Remove docker.sock mounts or use a restricted socket proxy.

container_rules.title: Policy forbids secrets in environment variables
container_rules.impact: Secrets in environment variables are easy to expose through inspect data and logs.
container_rules.recommendation: Move secrets to Docker secrets or an external secret manager.

project_rules.title: Policy requires Dockerfile USER instruction
project_rules.impact: Images without an explicit USER usually run as root.
project_rules.recommendation: Create a dedicated application user and add USER before runtime commands.
